name: Cotton Candy
notes: Only fires on selling_self: grants negative edition to adjacent jokers in the joker row. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Wrapped
notes: Only fires on end_of_round (round countdown, self-destructs and spawns a replacement Food joker) and forcetrigger. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Chocolate Dice
notes: Only fires on end_of_round when boss blind — rolls a random SMODS Event (choco1-chocoN) that applies global modifiers. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Spy
notes: Flat ×0.5 Xmult (cursed debuff joker). config.x_mult = 0.5; joker_main always returns Xmult_mod = card.ability.x_mult.

name: Trick or Treat
notes: Only fires on selling_self (3-in-odds chance to spawn num_candies candy jokers, else spawns a cursed joker) and forcetrigger. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Candy Basket
notes: Accumulates a candy count via SMODS.scale_card on end_of_round; spawns candy jokers on selling_self. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Blacklist
notes: Fires in joker_main but zeroes hand_chips and mult as a global side-effect (hand_chips = to_big(0); mult = to_big(0)) rather than returning an Fx; no calcJoker Fx field models this nullification.

name: Ghost
notes: Only fires on end_of_round: probabilistically self-destructs (and dissolves possessed jokers) or possesses a random joker by setting ability.cry_possessed. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Rotten Egg
notes: Fires on end_of_round (decrements sell_cost of all jokers) and selling_card (tracks money lost, self-destructs when threshold reached). Economy / meta effect only; no evaluate_play hook.

name: Candy Dagger
notes: Fires on setting_blind: destroys the joker immediately to its right and spawns a candy joker. Also forcetrigger path. No evaluate_play hook.

name: Candy Cane
notes: individual context fires an economy effect ($4 per scored card on second trigger via candy_caned flag); end_of_round decrements rounds counter and self-destructs at 0; no chips/mult/xmult/xchips output during evaluate_play

name: Candy Buttons
notes: only fires in context.reroll_shop — decrements reroll count by 1 each shop reroll and self-destructs when count reaches 0; also adjusts reroll cost via add_to_deck/remove_from_deck hooks; never fires during evaluate_play

name: Jawbreaker
notes: only fires in context.end_of_round during boss blinds — calls Cryptid.manipulate({value=2}) on adjacent jokers to upgrade them, then self-destructs; pure joker mutation effect, no scoring output

name: Mellowcreme
notes: only fires in context.selling_self — multiplies sell value of all consumable cards in hand by sell_mult (4); economy/shop effect, never fires during evaluate_play

name: Brittle
notes: fires in context.before (cardarea==jokers, scoring_hand present) — randomly sets the last scoring card's enhancement to stone/gold/steel each hand; decrements rounds counter (starts at 9) and self-destructs at 0; card mutation before scoring, produces no chips/mult/xmult output itself

name: Monopoly Money
notes: fires in context.buying_card (1-in-4 chance to dissolve/destroy purchased card) and context.selling_self (halves player money via ease_dollars); economy/shop disruption effect, never fires during evaluate_play

name: Candy Sticks
notes: fires in context.setting_blind to disable boss blind for 1 hand, context.after to decrement hands counter, and context.end_of_round/selling_self to re-enable blind and self-destruct; blind-manipulation effect, no scoring output

name: Wonka Bar
notes: only fires in context.selling_self — calls SMODS.change_play_limit(+1) and SMODS.change_discard_limit(+1) to permanently increase hand/discard selection limits; sell-trigger economy/meta effect, no scoring output

name: Buttercup
notes: maintains a cry_storage CardArea on the joker; fires in context.selling_self to release stored shop cards into G.GAME.next_shop_cards so they appear next shop; shop-storage utility effect, no scoring output

name: cry-CodeJoker
notes: Creates a negative Code consumable when entering a Boss blind (context.setting_blind) or on forcetrigger; no joker_main/individual/held/repetition branch exists

name: cry-copypaste
notes: Copies a Code consumable when used (context.using_consumeable / context.pull_card) and resets a per-round lock at end_of_round; purely consumable economy, no scoring branch

name: cry-cut
accumulator: x; +0.5 per Code card destroyed when leaving shop (context.ending_shop via SMODS.scale_card); base 1.0
notes: Destroys a random Code consumable each time you leave the shop and gains +0.5 Xmult (starting at 1); joker_main emits that accumulated Xmult when above 1.0

name: cry-blender
notes: Creates a random consumable when a Code card is used (context.using_consumeable); no config.extra values and no scoring branch

name: cry-python
accumulator: x; +0.15 per Code card used (context.using_consumeable); base 1.0
notes: Gains +0.15 Xmult each time a Code consumable is used; joker_main emits the accumulated Xmult when above 1.0; config.extra.Xmult_mod = 0.15, starting Xmult = 1
